context: Tests whether the Contacts skill keeps picker semantics separate from store authorization and rejects unsupported Swift change-history snippets.

checklist.name: Picker authorization
checklist.description: States that CNContactPickerViewController does not require full Contacts authorization and gives the app access only to the user's final selection.

checklist.name: Picker predicates
checklist.description: Mentions configuring predicateForEnablingContact, predicateForSelectionOfContact, predicateForSelectionOfProperty, or displayedPropertyKeys before presenting the picker.

checklist.name: Reject nonexistent Swift API
checklist.description: Rejects store.enumerateChanges(matching:) as nonexistent Contacts Swift API rather than presenting it as valid code.

checklist.name: Swift-safe change handling
checklist.description: Explains that the change-history enumerator is Objective-C-only or unavailable in Swift and recommends CNContactStoreDidChange refetching or an explicit Objective-C bridge for true incremental history.
